executives.name: Louis-Pierre Gignac
executives.background: Mr. Gignac has more than 20 years of experience in the mining industry. He is currently the President and Chief Executive Officer of G Mining Ventures. Prior to this, he was a co-founder of G Mining Services Inc. and held various senior roles in mining engineering and project management. He holds a Bachelor of Mining Engineering from McGill University and a Master of Applied Science from Polytechnique Montréal.

executives.name: Marc-Antoine Audet
executives.background: Mr. Audet has over 15 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. He previously served as Vice President, Corporate Development and Investor Relations at G Mining Ventures. He holds a Bachelor of Commerce from HEC Montréal and is a CFA charterholder.

executives.name: Duane Lo
executives.background: Mr. Lo is a senior financial executive with over 25 years of experience in the mining industry. He was previously the CFO of Entrée Resources Ltd. and Luna Gold Corp. He is a Chartered Professional Accountant.

executives.name: Eduardo Leao
executives.background: Mr. Leao has extensive experience in the Brazilian mining sector, having served as the Director of the National Mining Agency (ANM) in Brazil. He oversees the company's operations and sustainability initiatives in Brazil.

tenure_dates.title: Vice President, Sustainability & Brazil Country Manager

board_of_directors.name: Louis-Pierre Gignac
board_of_directors.background: President and CEO of G Mining Ventures Corp. with over 20 years of experience in mining engineering and project development.

board_of_directors.name: Louis Gignac Sr.
board_of_directors.background: Chairman of G Mining Ventures. He was the founder of Cambior Inc. and has over 45 years of experience in the mining industry. He is a member of the Canadian Mining Hall of Fame.

board_of_directors.name: David Fennell
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Fennell has been involved in the mining industry for over 35 years. He was the founder of Golden Star Resources Ltd. and has served on numerous boards of public mining companies.

board_of_directors.name: Normand Champigny
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Champigny is a geological engineer with over 40 years of experience. He is currently the CEO of Quebec Precious Metals Corporation.

board_of_directors.name: Elif Lévesque
board_of_directors.background: Ms. Lévesque is a Chartered Professional Accountant with over 20 years of experience in finance and the mining industry. She was a founder of Nomad Royalty Company.

board_of_directors.name: Jason Neal
board_of_directors.background: Mr. Neal was previously the President and CEO of TMAC Resources and Co-Head of Global Metals and Mining at BMO Capital Markets.

sources.source_description: Company Website - Board of Directors Page
